name: Cash Cow
description_short: Cash Cow offers same-day payday loans up to $700 and car title loans up to $1,400 with no credit check in Kenner, LA, serving customers with urgent cash needs.
description_long:
Cash Cow is a storefront lender operating in Kenner, Louisiana, specializing in short-term emergency cash products. The company operates a physical location at 3233 Williams Boulevard and provides both payday loans and title-secured loans to residents seeking immediate liquidity without traditional credit evaluation.

The company offers two primary products: payday loans up to $700 with same-day funding and no credit check, requiring only government ID, proof of an active checking account, and a recent pay stub; and car title loans up to $1,400 that use vehicle titles as collateral while allowing borrowers to continue driving their vehicles. Both products emphasize fast approval timelines, with decisions available in minutes and cash accessible the same day upon approval. The application process begins online through a short form, followed by phone confirmation and in-person completion at their Kenner location.

Cash Cow distinguishes itself through convenience features including a centrally located storefront, extended weekday hours (10 AM–6 PM Monday–Friday, 9 AM–1 PM Saturday), and simplified underwriting that bypasses credit score evaluation. The company explicitly markets to consumers with poor or non-existent credit histories, positioning credit-independent approval as a primary advantage. Their messaging emphasizes accessibility and speed as core competitive advantages.

While Cash Cow serves a genuine need for consumers facing urgent cash shortages, prospective borrowers should understand that payday and title loans typically carry high annual percentage rates and short repayment terms that can create debt cycles. The website does not disclose APR, fees, or repayment terms, which are material factors in evaluating the true cost of borrowing. These products are emergency-use only and not suitable for long-term financial solutions.
pros: Same-day cash funding available upon approval with no credit check required
Payday loans up to $700; title loans up to $1,400 provide flexible borrowing amounts
Car title loans allow borrowers to retain and drive their vehicle while using it as collateral
Title loans do not require income verification, only basic identification and vehicle documentation
Simple online application process initiates lending decision in minutes
Physical storefront location provides in-person support and immediate fund distribution
Extended Saturday hours (9 AM–1 PM) improve accessibility beyond standard business hours
cons: Website does not disclose annual percentage rates (APR), fees, or repayment terms, preventing transparent cost comparison
Payday and title loans carry structural risk of debt cycles due to short terms and high costs
No mention of alternative repayment options, hardship programs, or credit-building features
Collateral-based title lending creates risk of vehicle loss if repayment defaults
Limited service area (single Kenner location) restricts accessibility for regional customers
best_for: Consumers facing urgent, unexpected expenses (medical bills, emergency repairs) who need cash within hours
Borrowers with poor or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans or lines of credit
Vehicle owners seeking short-term cash who can reliably repay within the loan term
diagnosis: Cash Cow is best suited for consumers experiencing genuine financial emergencies who have exhausted other funding sources and can repay quickly. The primary caveat is that payday and title loans are high-cost products designed only for short-term emergencies; undisclosed APR and fees make true cost evaluation impossible from the website alone, and borrowers should seek rate quotes before committing.
services: Payday loans up to $700 with same-day funding
Car title loans up to $1,400 using vehicle as collateral
Online loan application and request submission
Phone consultation with loan specialist to confirm borrower details
In-person loan completion and document signing at Kenner location
Vehicle inspection and appraisal for title loan qualification
